description: Perform an ABC inventory analysis on the Chinook database tracks based on sales revenue using the database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db (connection name 'Chinook'). Calculate total revenue for each track with at least one sale and classify them into categories: 'A' (top 70% of total revenue), 'B' (next 20%), and 'C' (bottom 10%) based on cumulative revenue percentage ordered descending. Create a table named 'track_abc_classification' containing TrackId, TrackName, ArtistName, TotalRevenue, RevenueRank, CumulativePct, and ABCCategory. Export the full classification to /home/ga/Documents/exports/abc_classification.csv and a summary report (count, total revenue, and revenue percentage per category) to /home/ga/Documents/exports/abc_summary.csv. Save the SQL analysis script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/abc_analysis.sql.
